visualizerParams.title: Integer Right Triangles
visualizerParams.problemDescription: Refactor the solution to use the generating formula for Pythagorean triples (Euclid's formula) for even better performance.

solution.explanation: Generating primitive triples and their multiples is significantly faster than checking every perimeter. This approach reduces the complexity to approximately O(sqrt(limit) * multiples), which is nearly O(limit).
